questions.text: If a dozen Alphonso mangoes cost ₹1,200, what is the cost of 3 mangoes?
In Cricket, if a batsman scores a century, how many runs has he scored?
Which Indian mathematician is famous for discovering 'Zero'?
How many centimeters are there in 5 meters?
If the time is 15:30 in 24-hour format, what is it in 12-hour format?
A 'Lakh' consists of how many zeros?
Calculate the area of a square if one side is 12 cm.
In a class of 40 students, 60% are girls. How many boys are there?
What is the value of 'x' in the linear equation: 3x - 5 = 10?
